manifest.author: Nuthrash
manifest.description: This is a HTML file reader plugin for Obsidian. Can open document with ".html" and ".htm" file extensions.
manifest.name: HTML Reader

releases.description:

releases.author: nuthrash
releases.description:
Version 1.0.13

## New
1. Add supporting MHTML file format. (#19)
2. Add the feature of opening links to other vault items in new tabs with CTRL+Click keys. (#27)
3. Add the feature of refreshing opened HTML file view with the F5 key. (#28)

## Changes
1. Update some visual effects, icons, and texts for consistent with current Obsidian's style.
releases.name: 1.0.13 Release

releases.author: nuthrash
releases.description:
Version 1.0.12

## New
1. Add supporting extra file extensions for HTML files. (#18)

## Changes
1. Modify scaling method to avoid conflict with some HTML files' CSS attributes. (#20)
releases.name: 1.0.12 Release

releases.author: nuthrash
releases.description:
Version 1.0.11

## Fixes

releases.name: 1.0.11 Release

Version 1.0.8

releases.author: nuthrash
releases.description:
Version 1.0.7
## Changes
1. Refactor CSS isolation facilities from Shadow DOM to IFrame. ([#7](https://github.com/nuthrash/obsidian-html-plugin/issues/7))
2. Refactor related facilities for IFrame and isolate all Operating Modes.
3. Remove some useless HTML Sanitization attributes for Obsidian platform.

## Fixes
1. Fix setting page table color in dark mode. ([#6](https://github.com/nuthrash/obsidian-html-plugin/issues/6))
releases.name: 1.0.7 Release

releases.author: nuthrash
releases.description:
Version 1.0.6
## Changes
1. Add new setting "Operating Mode". Users can switch to less restricted modes by themselves.

## Fixes
1. Fix error cutting CSS variables sequence.
releases.name: 1.0.6 Release

releases.author: nuthrash
releases.description:
Version 1.0.5
## Changes
1. Change HTML Sanitization sanitizer to self-designed `sanitizeAndApplyPatches()` and only sanitize HTML attributes to prevent XSS attacks.
2. Remove "sanitize-html" HTML Sanitization package because its sub-module invoke some APIs only available on desktop version of Obsidian.

## Fixes
1. Fix unable enabling this plugin after installed to the mobile version of Obsidian.
2. Fix error comparison of CSS selector for ":root".
releases.name: 1.0.5 Release

releases.author: nuthrash
releases.description:
Version 1.0.4
## Changes
1. Change HTML Sanitization package to "sanitize-html" and only sanitize HTML attributes to prevent XSS attacks.
    - Now, this plugin can view local image files after added `app://local/` or `app://local//` prefix string to `src` attribute by hands (refer to "[Allow embed of Local images using `![](file:///...)`](https://forum.obsidian.md/t/allow-embed-of-local-images-using-file/1990/4)").
2. Isolate the content of HTML file with Shadow DOM and div style to prevent CSS Style Pollution.

## Fixes
1. Fix Declarative Shadow DOM elements not loaded properly.
2. Fix global CSS effects of HTML files would cause main program misarrange layout problem.

## New
1. Add SingleFileZ's compressed HTML-like file format support.

## Bugs
1. Cannot be enabled at mobile version of Obsidian because of using desktop-only APIs. (#5)
releases.name: 1.0.4 Release

releases.author: nuthrash
releases.description:
Version 1.0.3 - merged into Obsidian's community plugins https://obsidian.md/plugins.
## Changes
1. Remove HtmlPluginSettings.ts and related code.
2. Change `innerHTML` to `noticeEl.createEl()` of `showError()`.
3. Change `console.log()` to `showError()`.
releases.name: 1.0.3 Release

releases.author: nuthrash
releases.description:
## Changes
1. Change HTML file parsing result from string to DOM object.
2. Change the behavior of `user-select` to `text` when `user-select` is not set.(avoid some HTML files unable to select text)
3. Change the behavior of `overflow` to `auto` when `overflow` is not set.(avoid some HTML files unable to scroll)

## Fixes
1. Fix some HTML files would lose some elements when `WHOLE_DOCUMENT` is not set to true.
2. Fix external CSS files not load properly.
releases.name: 1.0.2 Release

releases.author: nuthrash
releases.description:
## Changes
1. Add HTML sanitization mechanism to filter out most of suspicious codes from HTML files.
releases.name: 1.0.1 Release

releases.author: nuthrash
releases.description:
## First Release
- Basic functionality of the plugin implemented
releases.name: 1.0.0 First Release
